overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a dark coat and hat walking through a rainy rural farmland. The character traverses muddy paths between wooden barns, crop fields, and animal pens under an overcast stormy sky with an industrial smokestack visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy farm path beside wooden barn and tall crops

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a muddy path beside a large wooden barn, moving past sacks and farming equipment

entered.detail: weathered wooden barn with corrugated metal roof and stacked sacks along the side
dense tall green vegetation growing in rows along the path edge
rough wooden post fence running parallel to the path
industrial smokestack emitting smoke visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy farm path flanked by tall crops on the left and a large weathered wooden barn on the right. Rain falls steadily as the camera follows from behind, showing wooden fences and farming equipment along the barn wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with scattered wooden structures

events.description: exiting the covered barn area into more open farmland with scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the large barn toward an open wooden shelter with a horse inside

notable_agents.action: horse standing under the wooden shelter, partially visible

entered.detail: open-fronted wooden shed with a horse standing inside
rows of cultivated crops extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the large barn, the scene opens into farmland with an open wooden shelter on the left housing a horse. The path continues between crop fields as rain intensifies and the red barn becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cultivated crop field with farm buildings ahead

events.description: character turns slightly right, entering the rows of the crop field

agents.ego_description: walking through the cultivated field rows, approaching the animal pens and red barn

notable_agents.action: group of horses or cattle standing in the fenced pen near the red barn

entered.detail: large red wooden barn with white trim and double doors, weathered paint
fenced enclosure containing several horses or cattle
old wooden well structure with roof and bucket mechanism

segments.scene_description: The character turns into the crop field, walking between rows of plants toward a prominent red barn. To the left, an animal pen contains horses or cattle, while a wooden well structure becomes visible near the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmyard with red barn and animal enclosures

events.description: character slows slightly while passing the wooden well structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the red barn while passing the wooden well, observing the farm animals in the adjacent pen

notable_agents.action: horses grazing and moving within the fenced enclosure

entered.detail: small weathered wooden shed with metal roof beside the red barn

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the wooden well and continues toward the large red barn, with farm animals visible in the pens to the left. The ground shows deep muddy ruts from wagon wheels and livestock, while additional wooden farm buildings appear on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy rural farmstead that transitions from a narrow muddy path into an expansive area of livestock pens and barns. It begins by trailing the character along a muddy track flanked by tall crops and a weathered wooden barn, with rain falling steadily over the surrounding fences and equipment. As the camera moves past the first barn, the scene opens into a wider stretch of farmland featuring an open wooden horse shelter before the path leads toward a prominent red barn in the distance. The character then turns directly into the crop fields, passing an animal pen and a wooden well as the rain intensifies. Finally, the camera follows the character through deep muddy wagon ruts toward the large red barn, with additional wooden farm buildings appearing on the right.
